testcases.input: s = "010" Output: "001" Explanation: Because there is just one '1', it must be in the last position. So the answer is "001".
testcases.expectedOutput: "001" Explanation: Because there is just one '1', it must be in the last position. So the answer is "001".

testcases.input: s = "0101" Output: "1001" Explanation: One of the '1's must be in the last position. The maximum number that can be made with the remaining digits is "100". So the answer is "1001".
